machine.name: Life Balance Nutrition And Metabolic Health Food Mood Journal Review
machine.description: Life-balance machine for food mood journal review in the nutrition and metabolic health workstream. It monitors food intake, mood rating, anxiety, attention, and sleep-next-day effect to support lifestyle-psychiatry workflows spanning psychiatric care, nutrition, sleep, movement, stress resilience, monitoring, and projection. Example only; not medical advice.

metadata.domain: Life Balance - Nutrition And Metabolic Health
metadata.author: Reality Engine
metadata.focusDescription: food intake, mood rating, anxiety, attention, and sleep-next-day effect
sourceContext: Ann Childers, MD public lifestyle-psychiatry biography emphasizing mainstream psychiatry, nutrition, sleep, general health, CGM, genetics, and temperament testing.
Lifestyle psychiatry six-pillar framing: nutrition, sleep, movement, stress management, relationships, and harm reduction.
metadata.clinicalSafety: Example workflow automation only; outputs route to review, plan adjustment, monitoring, or stable status and are not diagnosis or treatment.
metadata.upstreamMachine: Life Balance Nutrition And Metabolic Health Protein Sufficiency Monitor
downstreamMachines: Life Balance Nutrition And Metabolic Health Hydration Electrolyte Monitor
agentActions: Route food mood journal review concern to licensed care-team review.
Adjust the life-balance plan for food mood journal review using patient goals, barriers, and preferences.
Create monitoring or follow-up task for food mood journal review.
Continue stable life-balance monitoring for food mood journal review.
metadata.reuseGuideline: Map patient-reported outcomes, sleep logs, nutrition journals, CGM summaries, activity data, medication observations, temperament/genetics notes, and care-team review status into the 4D input lane. Route outputs to licensed clinician review, plan adjustment, monitoring tasks, or stable follow-up.
